meta.project: NASHTY OS - Complete Restaurant Operations System

product_overview: NASHTY OS is a cloud-ready restaurant operations backend for POS, KDS, and Backoffice workflows. It supports cashier authentication, outlet and menu loading, order processing, shift management, dashboard reporting, and manager PIN verification across a single Express.js API.
core_goals: Enable secure cashier and manager authentication for outlet-based operations
Provide unified menu data for POS order entry and modifier selection
Support reliable order creation, status updates, and void handling
Manage shift opening, closing, and summary reporting for daily operations
Expose dashboard KPIs and recent order data for Backoffice monitoring

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Lets users load active staff and outlets, authenticate cashiers with PINs, and verify manager PINs for restricted actions like voids or large discounts.
user_flows: GET /api/auth/outlets -> Receive 200 with active outlet list -> GET /api/auth/staff/:outletId -> Receive 200 with active cashier list -> POST /api/auth/login with valid userId and PIN -> Receive 200 with cashier session data -> GET /api/shifts/active/:outletId -> Receive 200 indicating active or inactive shift

GET /api/auth/outlets -> Receive 200 with outlet list -> GET /api/auth/staff/:outletId -> Receive 200 with staff list -> POST /api/auth/login with invalid PIN -> Receive 401 with authentication error -> User retries login after failed attempt

POST /api/auth/verify-manager-pin with valid manager PIN -> Receive 200 confirming manager authorization -> PUT /api/orders/:id/void with reason and manager identity -> Receive 200 with voided order status
POST /api/auth/verify-manager-pin with invalid or non-manager PIN -> Receive 401 or 403 with authorization error -> User is blocked from proceeding with void-related action

features.name: Menu API
features.description: Provides outlet-specific categories, items, and modifier groups so POS and Backoffice can render the full menu in one request.
user_flows: GET /api/menu/outlet/:outletId -> Receive 200 with categories, items, and modifier groups -> POS renders menu grid and category tabs -> User selects an item and modifiers from the returned data
GET /api/menu/outlet/:outletId -> Receive 200 with menu payload -> Client filters items locally by category/search -> Selected item is added to cart using returned menu details
GET /api/menu/outlet/:outletId with invalid outletId -> Receive 404 or 400 with validation error -> POS cannot load menu and shows an error state
GET /api/menu/outlet/:outletId -> Receive 200 with payload missing expected outlet data -> Client handles empty categories/items response gracefully and prevents checkout

features.name: Orders API
features.description: Creates orders, lists orders for KDS or Backoffice, returns shift history, exposes POS configuration, updates order or item status, and supports order voiding.
user_flows: GET /api/orders/config/:outletId -> Receive 200 with active payment methods and service charge settings -> POST /api/orders with outletId, shiftId, items, and payments -> Receive 200 with order id, order number, and pending status -> GET /api/orders?outletId=:outletId&kitchenStatus=pending -> Receive 200 with newly created order in the queue

GET /api/orders/shift/:shiftId -> Receive 200 with order history for the shift -> PUT /api/orders/:id/void with reason and manager authorization -> Receive 200 with voided order status and void reason recorded -> GET /api/orders/shift/:shiftId -> Receive 200 with voided order excluded from totals but present in history

GET /api/orders?outletId=:outletId&kitchenStatus=preparing -> Receive 200 with active kitchen orders -> PATCH /api/orders/:id/status with itemId and itemStatus=ready -> Receive 200 with updated item status -> PATCH /api/orders/:id/status with status=completed -> Receive 200 with completed order status
POST /api/orders with missing required fields or invalid payment totals -> Receive 400 with validation error -> No order record is created
PUT /api/orders/:id/void without prior manager PIN verification -> Receive 401 or 403 authorization error -> Order remains unchanged

features.name: Shifts API
features.description: Checks for active shifts, opens new shifts, closes them with cash totals, and returns summary reports for reconciliation.
user_flows: GET /api/shifts/active/:outletId -> Receive 200 showing no active shift -> POST /api/shifts with outletId, userId, and openingCash -> Receive 200 with opened shift details -> GET /api/shifts/active/:outletId -> Receive 200 showing the active shift
GET /api/shifts/active/:outletId -> Receive 200 showing active shift exists -> POS skips opening a duplicate shift and continues operation
PUT /api/shifts/:id/close with closingCash -> Receive 200 with closed shift status -> GET /api/shifts/:id/summary -> Receive 200 with gross sales, discounts, void count, and payment breakdown
POST /api/shifts with invalid outletId or missing openingCash -> Receive 400 with validation error -> Shift is not opened
PUT /api/shifts/:id/close for a non-existent or already closed shift -> Receive 404 or 409 with error -> No summary is generated

features.name: Dashboard API
features.description: Supplies Backoffice KPI metrics and recent transaction lists for outlet performance monitoring.
user_flows: GET /api/dashboard/kpi?outletId=:outletId&date=YYYY-MM-DD -> Receive 200 with revenue, transactions, discounts, average order value, and payment breakdown -> Backoffice renders KPI cards
GET /api/dashboard/recent-orders?outletId=:outletId&limit=10 -> Receive 200 with the latest transactions -> Backoffice renders recent order table with cashier names
GET /api/dashboard/kpi with missing outletId or invalid date -> Receive 400 with validation error -> Dashboard widgets cannot be populated
GET /api/dashboard/recent-orders?outletId=:outletId&limit=10 -> Receive 200 with empty list for a no-activity outlet -> Backoffice shows an empty-state view

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Login, verifying PINs, and getting list of staff/outlets

Verify Manager PIN for void/large discount

POS config, service charge, payment methods
